description: Identify aging inventory past a day threshold with total capital exposure by model. Critical for reducing carrying costs and floor plan interest.

configuration.query: FROM dealer-inventory | WHERE days_on_lot >= ?minDays AND status == "available" | STATS total_units = COUNT(*), total_exposure = SUM(msrp) BY model | SORT total_exposure DESC | LIMIT ?limit

minDays.description: Minimum days on lot to flag as aging
